name: Roast Chicken with Lemon Zest & Green Olives
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pitted green olives (6 oz), drained and julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven or roasting pan.
2. Place the chickens, breast down, in the pan.
3. In a bowl, combine ginger, paprika, bay leaves, garlic, onion, parsley, cilantro, and saffron (if using).
4. Spread the mixture over the chickens and season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Add enough water or chicken stock to cover the chickens halfway.
6. Place the pan on high heat and bring to a boil.
7. Remove the pan from the heat and place it in a 400-degree oven.
8. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
9. Turn the chickens over and continue baking until very tender and golden brown, about 30 more minutes.
10. Transfer the chickens to a serving platter.
11. Place the pan on the stove top and heat the remaining juices to a boil.
12. Add olives and lemon zest. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
13. Spoon the sauce over the chickens and serve. Makes 8 servings.
